song.title: Christ Has Come to Be Life
song.author: Phil Bradley
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G C G C Christ has come to be life, . G C G C The processed divine trinity. .G C G C God the Father's the source, . G C G A fountain emerging to be . D C G God the Son as a gushing up spring, . D C G In the Spirit - a river for life-imparting. . Em C Oh, how can this miracle be, . C D The triune God flowing in me?
[P] . G C G C Oh! I've got rivers of life . G C G C Flowing out of my innermost being. . G C G C Oh! I've got rivers of life . G C G Flowing out of my innermost being.
[C] .G C D G C D G As this life flows through me, I'm supplied abundantly. .Em C G D Em C G D His life nullifies sin! Power springs now from within! . Em C G D G-C-G-C To be free, overcoming spontaneously.
